channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Ascento Guard 2.0: Next-Gen #Autonomous Security #Robot Built for All-Terrain Patrols via @WevolverA...
item.description:
Ascento Guard 2.0: Next-Gen #Autonomous Security #Robot Built for All-Terrain Patrols via @WevolverApp

item.title: RT @tunguz: I asked Image 2 to create an image of a semi-conductor. https://t.co/lX45dN1cH9

item.title: However, older versions have a critical CVE, so you do need to upgrade! If you use uv (thanks to @ch...
item.description:
However, older versions have a critical CVE, so you do need to upgrade! If you use uv (thanks to @charliermarsh) you can pop this in your pyproject to work around it: ``` [tool.uv] override-dependencies = [ "pydantic>=2.5,<3", "numpy>2", "openai>=2.8,<3", "aiohttp>=3.10", "click>=8.1", "jsonschema>=4.22,<5", "python-dotenv>=1.0", "importlib-metadata>=6.0", ] ```
--- @jeremyphoward | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 239
item.author: @jeremyphoward

item.title: I know the litellm team have a *lot* going on, & I have no desire to increase their workload...
item.description:
I know the litellm team have a *lot* going on, &amp; I have no desire to increase their workload even more…
But if you're a litellm user, this is a critical issue to know about - it currently force downgrades your other packages if you use a recent version: https://t.co/RXWIzZo6Pg
--- @jeremyphoward | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 466
item.author: @jeremyphoward

item.title: RT @tunguz: Oh man, I wish he were wrong, but I feel like he might be right. 😭😭😭
